summary: Configuration data structures and loader: defines Config + 6 sub-config types, Load function, validation, path expansion, backward-compat migration
side_effects: Applies default values to config fields
notes: Central configuration package. Defines 6 specialized config types: TelegramConfig (API credentials, session), StorageConfig (DB path), RefreshConfig (auto-refresh settings), LLMConfig (provider: ollama/openrouter, timeouts), OpenRouterConfig (legacy/deprecated), SourceConfig (telegram/rss/reddit/hackernews metadata). Load() applies defaults: Ollama→localhost:11434, OpenRouter→openrouter.ai, timeouts based on provider (Ollama 120s, OpenRouter 30s), refresh interval defaults to 30 min. Backward-compat migration: old openrouter section → new llm section. Comprehensive validation of required fields per provider.
